title: CC narrative review S15 panel a1

payload.notes:
CC NARRATIVE reviewer, S15 (B08 "Wiki Rollback" centerpiece, 4th/final sub-panel; the rollback-arc RESOLUTION + executor character-arc turning point).

BEAT REQUIRED (comic.json P02_b08 + storyboard S15): two payloads — (1) the RE-RUN is ENFORCED: after S12 rollback-entry, S13 diagnosis, S14 K3->I-K3 upgrade, S15 must show the executor RE-RUNNING the task under the now-hardened invariant, i.e. the loop closing and the corrected run firing; (2) the executor CHARACTER-ARC TURNING POINT: this is where the executor stops resisting and accepts the rollback discipline — the emotional resolution of the whole arc.

STORY READ: narrative_beat_fidelity=3. The duo is present (executor + reviewer) and the wiki/rollback navy-void setting carries over, so the cell sits correctly in the B08 sequence and is distinct from S12/S13/S14. BUT the two required payloads under-read: the RE-RUN-ENFORCED beat is ambiguous — there is no clear visual cue that THIS is the corrected re-run firing under I-K3 (no obvious 'task restarting / loop closing' signal tying back to the S14 invariant), so it reads as a generic duo-in-wiki tableau rather than 'the enforced re-run resolving the arc'. The executor turning-point (resistance -> acceptance) is not legible from posture/expression alone and leans entirely on the forthcoming HTML caption to carry the meaning. composition_story=3: reading order is acceptable but the resolution does not land as a beat without text support.

Upside for retry: the duo staging + navy wiki-void are reusable; the fix is narrative-legibility (make the re-run/loop-closure and the acceptance turn read visually), NOT a restage. Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone-cleanliness / stray-text are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
